steps.text: Output mappers automatically mask sensitive patterns in tool responses using regex. Example: API keys, IP addresses, email addresses.
First, use 'Try It Out' above to call your tool and see a real response. This helps you identify what patterns need masking!
After calling the tool, come back here. Enter a regex pattern to match sensitive values. Example: '\b[A-Z0-9]{32}\b' for 32-char API keys.
